mapper.select: select t1.minor_nm as nm , t2.router_nm as route , left(t1.minor_cd, LENGTH(t1.minor_cd)-4) as detailCd , t1.remark as desc from esg.tb_common_d t1 left join esg.tb_sys_menu t2 on t1.major_cd = 'C0043' and right(t1.minor_cd,4) = t2.menu_id where t1.major_cd = 'C0043' order by t1.ord_seq asc
-- 상세 항목 불러오기 select t1.minor_cd as id , t1.minor_nm as nm , #{route} from esg.tb_common_d t1 where t1.major_cd = #{detailCd} order by t1.ord_seq asc
select count(t1.*) from esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey t1 where t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
select count(t1.*) from esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds t1 where t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'

select count(distinct t1.doc_no) from esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan t1 left join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation t2 on t1.write_year = t2.write_year and t1.doc_type = t2.doc_type and t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t2.use_yn = 'Y'

select count(t1.*) from esg.tb_emergency_response_training t1 left join esg.tb_emergency_response_training_result t2 on t1.write_year = t2.write_year and t1.doc_type = t2.doc_type and t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
and cast(substring(t2.action_dt from 5 for 2) AS integer) between 1 and 6; -- 상반기
and cast(substring(t2.action_dt from 5 for 2) AS integer) between 7 and 12; -- 하반기

select t1.orgn_id as id , t2.orgn_nm as nm , count(*) as printableCnt from ( select tab1.orgn_id, tab1.comp_id from esg.tb_orgn_status tab1 where tab1.write_year = #{writeYear} and tab1.comp_id = #{compId} and tab1.use_yn = 'Y' union all select tab2.orgn_id, tab2.comp_id from esg.tb_employees tab2 where tab2.write_year = #{writeYear} and tab2.comp_id = #{compId} and tab2.use_yn = 'Y' ) t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id group by t1.orgn_id, t2.orgn_nm, t2.ord_seq order by t2.ord_seq asc

select t1.orgn_id as id , t2.orgn_nm as nm , count(*) as printableCnt from esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' group by t1.orgn_id, t2.orgn_nm, t2.ord_seq order by t2.ord_seq asc

select t1.ctrl_orgn_id as id , t2.orgn_nm as nm , count(*) as printableCnt from esg.tb_corrective_action_request t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.ctrl_orgn_id = t2.orgn_id and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' group by t1.ctrl_orgn_id, t2.orgn_nm, t2.ord_seq order by t2.ord_seq asc
select count(t1.*) from esg.tb_hse_policy t1 where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
